texto: You are on a certain ‘step’. This state is meant for only you
autor: it is not applicable to other people. Others are on a different ‘step’. Therefore you cannot pressurize anyone. You cannot have any ‘objection’ towards them.
explicacao: Citação de it is not applicable to other people. Others are on a different ‘step’. Therefore you cannot pressurize anyone. You cannot have any ‘objection’ towards them. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “You are on a certain ‘step’. This state is meant for only you” articula reflexao, dada-bhagwan, certain em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
